titleStmt.title: Oxford, Bodleian Library, Bodleian Bruce 74
Enoch, Job, Isaiah, Minor Prophets, Proverbs, Wisdom of Solomon, Ecclesiastes, Song of Song, Daniel

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

extent.note: Data on leaves dimensions taken from fol. 62r.

list.item: The foliation refered to in Catalogus codicum manuscriptorum Bibliothecae Bodleianae Oxoniensis, Pars VII: Codices AethiopiciChristian Friedrich AugustDillmannOxoniiE Typographeo Academico1848https://archive.org/details/CatalogiCodicumManuscriptorumBibliothP7EthiopicOxfordCataloguingbm:Dillmann1848CatalogusEthiopicOxfordCataloguingbm:Dillmann1848Catalogus5b–8a is not visible in the manuscript anymore. It counted the first folio containing the main text as 1, the current fol. 7

Fols 1r–147r The manuscript is foliated in pencil in the upper right corner, beginning with 1 on the first blank parchment leaf. The paper fly-leaves, one each at the beginning and end of the manuscript, are not foliated. Two leaves have been foliated 63, now distinguished 63a and 63b, and 103, now distinguished 103a and 103b.

item.note: Two leaves have been foliated 63, now distinguished 63a and 63b.
Two leaves have been foliated 103, now distinguished 103a and 103b.

item.desc: Ex libris of James Bruce glued on the inner front board, containing shelfmarks of the manuscript: 74. Aeth. Cat. 1. Bruce of Kinnaird Nº 1
A pagemark of blue textile is sewn to the headband.

binding.decoNote: European binding, red leather with gilded borders. Imprinted on the spine: Old Testamen. Tom IV Cover of the inner board and first fly-leaf gilded paper with floral pattern. The text block has been trimmed and its edges were gilded. One paper fly-leaf each at the front and back, containing watermarks.

history.provenance: This manuscript was bought by James Bruce and is much older than the manuscripts which were copied for him during his stay.

msItem.title: Maṣḥafa Henok
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ መሐሪ፡ ወመስተሣህል፡ ርኁቀ፡ መዓት፡ ወብዙኀ፡ ምሕረት፡ ወጻድቅ፡ እጽሕፍ፡ አንሰ፡ መጽሐፈ፡ ሄኖክ፡ ነቢይ፡ በረከቱ፡ ወሀብተ፡ ረድኤቱ፡ የሀሉ፡ ምስለ፡ ፍቁሩ፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን።
msItem.note: There is no subscription.

note.p: The book is divided into sections (ምዕራፍ፡) and chapters (ክፍል፡). The chapter divisions correspond nearly everywhere to those in Libri Enoch prophetae versio aethiopicaRichardLaurenceOxoniae, LondiniTypis Academicis, impensis editoris. Prostat venalis apud J. H. Parker, Oxoniae; et J. G. et F. Rivington, Londini.1838https://babel.hathitrust.org/cgi/pt?id=mdp.39015069249368;view=1up;seq=5EnochApocryphabm:Laurence1839EnochEnochApocryphabm:Laurence1839Enoch, though the sequence of the numbers has been interrupted by several errors.

Not all sections are indicated, those which can be found are the following, referred to according to the chapter division in Libri Enoch prophetae versio aethiopicaRichardLaurenceOxoniae, LondiniTypis Academicis, impensis editoris. Prostat venalis apud J. H. Parker, Oxoniae; et J. G. et F. Rivington, Londini.1838https://babel.hathitrust.org/cgi/pt?id=mdp.39015069249368;view=1up;seq=5EnochApocryphabm:Laurence1839EnochEnochApocryphabm:Laurence1839Enoch:

msItem.note: The text of this manuscript contains many variants in comparison to Libri Enoch prophetae versio aethiopicaRichardLaurenceOxoniae, LondiniTypis Academicis, impensis editoris. Prostat venalis apud J. H. Parker, Oxoniae; et J. G. et F. Rivington, Londini.1838https://babel.hathitrust.org/cgi/pt?id=mdp.39015069249368;view=1up;seq=5EnochApocryphabm:Laurence1839EnochEnochApocryphabm:Laurence1839Enoch.

msItem.title: ʾIyob
msItem.note: The title and the beginning are missing.

note.p: The book is divided into sections (ምዕራፍ፡), some of which are irregularly numbered:

msItem.title: Book of Isaiah
msItem.note: The book is divided into sections (ምዕራፍ፡) and chapters (ክፍል፡), several of which are irregularly numbered.

msItem.title: Daqiqa nabiyāt
msItem.note:
The text of Book of Joel, Book of Jonah, Za-Sofonyās nabiyy and Za-Milkǝyās nabiyy has many variants compared to the editions by Johann Georg Nissel(ius) and Theodor Petraeus:
Prophetia Joel, aethiopice, interpretatione latina ad Verbum donata, & perbrevi vocum Hebraicarum & Arabicarum HARMONIA illustrataM. TheodorusPetraeusLugduni BatavorumSumptibus Auctoris & Typis Nisselianis1661https://books.google.de/books?id=fJ1bAAAAcAAJ&printsec=frontcover&hl=ar&source=gbs_ge_summary_r&cad=0#v=onepage&q&f=falsebm:Petraeus1661Joelbm:Petraeus1661Joel Prophetia Jonae: ex Aethiopico in Latinum ad verbum versa, et notis atque adagiis illustrata; cui adjunguntur quatuor Geneseos capita, è vetustissimo manuscripto Aethiop. eruta.M. TheodorusPetraeusLugduni BatavorumSumptibus Auctoris & Typis Nisselianis1660bm:Petraeus1660Jonasbm:Petraeus1660Jonas Vaticinum Malachiae, prophetarum ultimi, aethiopice, latino idiomate ad verbum donatum, & ad usum ad captum τῶν Φιλογλώσσων accomodatumM. TheodorusPetraeusLugduni BatavorumSumptibus Auctoris & Typis Nisselianis1661https://books.google.de/books?id=M74WywAACAAJ&printsec=frontcover&hl=ar&source=gbs_ge_summary_r&cad=0#v=onepage&q&f=falsebm:Petraeus1661Malachiaebm:Petraeus1661Malachiae Prohpetia Sophoniae, summa diligentiâ ad fidem vetustissimi MS.Codicis fideliter in Latinum versaJoh. Georg.NisselioLugduni BatavorumTypis & impensis Nisselianis1660https://books.google.de/books?id=f51bAAAAcAAJ&printsec=frontcover&hl=ar&source=gbs_ge_summary_r&cad=0#v=onepage&q&f=falsebm:Nissel1660Sophoniaebm:Nissel1660Sophoniae

msItem.title: ዘሆሴዕ፡ ነቢይ፡
msItem.explicit: ተፈጸመ፡ ትንቢት፡ ዘሆሴዕ፡ በረከተ፡ አምላኩ፡ ትኩን፡ ምስለ፡ ፍቁሩ፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን፡ ወአሜን።

note.p: The book is divided into sections (ምዕራፍ፡) and chapters (ክፍል፡). The sections correspond to the chapters of the Greek text, the chapters are the following:

msItem.title: ዘአሞጽ፡ ነቢይ፡
msItem.explicit: ተፈጸመ፡ ዘአሞጽ፡ ነቢይ፡ በረከተ፡ አምላኩ፡ ትሀሉ፡ ምስለ፡ ንጉሥነ፡ ወምስለ፡ ፍቁሩ፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን።

note.p: The book is divided into sections (ምዕራፍ፡) and chapters (ክፍል፡). The sections correspond to the chapters of the Greek text, the chapters are the following:
The book is divided into sections (ምዕራፍ፡) and chapters (ክፍል፡). The sections correspond to the chapters of the Greek text, the chapters are the following:
The book is divided into sections (ምዕራፍ፡) and chapters (ክፍል፡). The sections correspond to the chapters of the Greek text, the chapters are the following:

msItem.title: ዘአብድዩ፡ ነቢይ፡
msItem.note: The book is divided into two chapters, the second begins at verse 8.

msItem.title: ዘዮናስ፡ ነቢይ፡
msItem.note: From this book on, there are lacunae in the place of section and chapter indications.

msItem.title: Book of Nahum
msItem.note: There are lacunae in the place of section and chapter indications.

msItem.title: Book of Habakkuk
msItem.note: There are lacunae in the place of section and chapter indications.
The title and first words are missing.

msItem.title: Za-Sofonyās nabiyy
msItem.note: There are lacunae in the place of section and chapter indications.
The title and first words are missing.

msItem.title: Za-Ḥagge nabiyy
msItem.note: There are lacunae in the place of section and chapter indications.
The title and first words are missing.

msItem.title: Za-Zakāryās nabiyy
msItem.note: There are lacunae in the place of section and chapter indications.
The title and first words are missing.

msItem.title: Za-Milkǝyās nabiyy
msItem.note: There are lacunae in the place of section and chapter indications.
The title and first words are missing.

msItem.explicit: ተፈጸመ፡ ትንቢት፡ ዘ፲ወ፪ ደቂቀ፡ ነቢያት፡ ስብሐት፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ምሕረቱ፡ ወሣህሉ፡ የሀሉ፡ ምስለ፡ ፍቁሩ፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም።

msItem.title: ምሳልያተ፡ ሰሎሞን፡ ወልደ፡ ዳዊት፡ ዘነግሠ፡ ለእስራኤል፡ በኢየሩሳሌም፡
msItem.note: This part corresponds to Chapters 1-24 of the Greek text.

msItem.title: ተግሣጽ፡ ዘሰሎሞን፡ እለ፡ እነበለ፡ ኑፋቄ፡ ዘጸሐፉ፡ ለእርክቲሁ፡ ለሕዝቅያስ፡ ንጉሠ፡ ይሁዳ።
msItem.note: This part corresponds to Chapter 25 of the Greek text.

msItem.title: ቃለ፡ ምክብብ፡ ወልደ፡ ዳዊት፡ ንጉሠ፡ እስራኤል፡ ዘኢየሩሳሌም።

note.p: The book is divided into five chapters (ክፍል፡):

msItem.title: መሓልየ፡ መሓልይ፡ ዝውእቱ፡ ዘሰሎሞን።

note.p: The following chapters are indicated by rubricated beginnings:

msItem.note: From the beginning on, there are many marginal glosses, but from Chapter 3 of the Greek text, they have been included inside the text, which therefore differs considerably from the edition መጽሐፈ፡ መዝሙራት፡ ዘዳዊት — Psalterium Davidis aethiopice et latine cum duobus impressis & tribus MSStis codicibus diligenter collatum & emendatum, nec non variis lectionibus & notis philologicis illustratum, ut in præfatione pluribus dicetur. Accedunt Æthiopicè tantùm Hymni et Orationes aliquot Vet. et Novi Testamenti, item Canticum Canticorum, cum variis lectionibus & notisHiobLudolfFrancofurti ad Moenumprostat apud Johannem David Zunner et Nicolaum Wilhelmum Helwig1701EthiopicBibleEarly studiesPsalterLudolfbm:Ludolf1701PsalteriumEthiopicBibleEarly studiesPsalterLudolfbm:Ludolf1701Psalterium. See also .

msItem.title: Daniel, Book of (includes Daniel, Susanna and Bel and the Dragon)
msItem.explicit: ተፈጸመ፡ ዘዳንኤል፡ ነቢይ፡ በረከተ፡ አምላኩ፡ ትኩን፡ ምስለ፡ ፍቁሩ፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን። ስብሐት፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ዘአፈጸመኒ፡ ዘንተ።
msItem.note: There is no title.
The sequence of the text, which also contains the apocryphic additions, agrees with the Greek recension.

layout.note: Data on text area and margin dimensions taken from fol. 62r.
layout.ab: Ruling is visible. Pricking has been partly cut off when the folios where cut for binding.

handNote.seg: Incipit, chapter beginnings, parts of numerals.
Only on fol. 37r, elsewhere, spaces for rubrication have been left blank.
Incipit, chapter beginnings, parts of numerals up until fols. 56vr, , and from 76r–97r, elsewhere, spaces for rubrication have been left blank or rubrication is irregular.

item.desc: The owner's name has been erased everywhere.
Spaces for rubricated titles and chapter numbers have been mostly left unfilled.
Interpretatory annotations have been added in the margins.
Interpretatory annotations have been added in the margins.
Interpretatory annotations have been added in the margins.
Interpretatory annotations have been added in the margins.
European verse and book correspondences are occasionally noted in the margin, for example on fols. 17v, and 136r.

bibl.title: Catalogus codicum manuscriptorum Bibliothecae Bodleianae Oxoniensis, Pars VII: Codices Aethiopici
Liber Henoch aethiopice, ad quinque codicum fidem editus, cum variis lectionibus

msItem.title: Book of Ezekiel (General record)
msItem.note: Excerpts from Book of Ezekiel (General record) 40.

extent.note: These six leaves have been prefixed to .

bibl.title: Catalogus codicum manuscriptorum Bibliothecae Bodleianae Oxoniensis, Pars VII: Codices Aethiopici

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:revisionDesc.change: Updated with codicological information (collation, foliation, layout, condition, extras) during consultation of the manuscript.
Improved binding according to proposal by Denis Nosnitsin

t:div.t:ab: 4:1-4 ነያ፡ ሠናይት፡ እንተ፡ ኃቤየ፡ ነያ፡ ሠናይት። አዕይንትኪ፡ ዘርግብ። ሥዕርትኪ፡ ከመ፡ መርዔተ፡ አጣሊ፡ እለ፡ ተከሥታ፡ እምአድባረ፡ ገለአድ። ስነንኪ፡ ከመ፡ መራዕይ፡ እለ፡ ተቀርጻ። እለ፡ ዓርጋ፡ እምሕፃብ። ኵሎን፡ እለ፡ ይመነትዋ። ስብዓ፡ ወስብዓተ፡ ይወልዳ። ወአልቦ፡ እምኔሆን፡ መካን። ከመ፡ ፍሕሰ፡ ቀይሕ፡ ከናፍርኪ። ወንባብኪ፡ አዳም። ከመ፡ ቅርፍተ፡ ሮማን፡ መላትሕኪ። እንበለ፡ አርምሞትኪ። ወከመ፡ ማኅፈደ፡ ዳዊት፡ ክሳድኪ። እለ፡ ተሐንፃ፡ ውስተ፡ ተልፍዮስ። ዓሠርቱ፡ ምእት፡ ንዋየ፡ ሐቅል፡ ስቁል፡ ውስቴቱ። ኀበ፡ ኢይበጽሖ፡ ሰብእ። ወኢይሬእዮ፡ ፀሐይ። ወኵሎን፡ መዋጽፍተ፡ ቤቱ፡ ኃያላን። ወጽኑዓን፡ እለ፡ የዐቅብዎ። ሠለስቱ፡ ዕደው።
